opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Hayley mentioned fair pricing on a job with JT Plumbing. That stood out.
source_quote:
Highly recommend, Josh gave our heating system a complete overhaul replacing all our radiators, flushing out the system (which was in a right state) and fitting a Hive system thermostat.

Josh was honest, prompt and very well priced! Which I think is rare nowadays, he could have let us spend much mo
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about fair pricing (Hayley)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Hayley mentioned fair pricing - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
